arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal monitor Atletico Madrid talent Adrian Nino
arts.sum: Arsenal are keeping close tabs on Atletico Madrid’s highly-rated young forward Adrian Nino, FootballTransfers understands. The 20-year-old, who has been turning heads in Atleti’s B-team, is regarded as a bright attacking prospect in Spain - and with new sporting director Andrea Berta set to get to work at the Emirates, his links to the Madrid giants could make this a transfer to watch.
All 20 LaLiga teams are in action this weekend with four matches on Saturday, five on Sunday and a Monday night game, and Phil Agius previews all 10 fixtures.

arts.ttl: Sources: Griezmann to delay Atleti exit for MLS
arts.sum: Antoine Griezmann is likely to stay at Atlético Madrid next season, sources have told ESPN, despite his longstanding interest in playing in MLS.

arts.ttl: Report: A change of heart at Tottenham could now see them sell their star player
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur could be set for a major defensive shake-up this summer, with vice-captain Cristian Romero’s future at the club now uncertain. Despite being under contract until 2027, speculation is growing over a potential exit—a significant shift from Spurs’ earlier stance on securing his long-term future. arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Griezmann plans to stay at Atlético, eyes MLS for 2026
arts.sum: Antoine Griezmann plans to stay at Atlético Madrid, pushing a potential MLS move to 2026. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Tottenham have now decided whether they want to sell Cristian Romero amid Atletico Madrid links - journalist
Real Madrid quartet investigated for indecent conduct following wild celebrations at Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid knocked Atletico out of the Champions League in contentious fashion

arts.ttl: UEFA to investigate Mbappé, Vini over Atleti game
arts.sum: Four Real Madrid players, including Kylian Mbappé and Vinícius Júnior, are being investigated for alleged "indecent conduct" during the Champions League game at Atlético Madrid, UEFA said on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid: Kylian Mbappe and Vinicius Jr at risk of Champions League ban for Arsenal tie
arts.sum: UEFA have launched an investigation into four Real Madrid players
